class.name: ColorButton
class.brief_description: A customizable button that allows the user to select a color.
class.description: A button that provides functionality to respond to color changes and right-click actions, making it useful for UI color pickers or palette tools. By default, the button's [member BaseButton.toggle_mode] is set to [code]true[/code].

members.member: The color displayed by the button. Changing this value doesn't emit [signal color_changed], use [method set_color] instead.
Determines whether the button has a flat appearance.

signal.name: color_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the button's color is changed programmatically using [method set_color] or through user interaction.

signal.name: color_selected
signal.description: Emitted when the button is toggled on.

signal.name: right_click_pressed
signal.description: Emitted when the button is right-clicked, with the index parameter indicating it's index position inside parent.

theme_items.theme_item: The background texture of the button ie. the checker pattern visible when the color's alpha is less than 1.0.
The style applied when the button is disabled.
The style applied when the button has focus, ie. drawing a border over the current [StyleBox].
The style applied when the button is hovered over.
The style applied when the button is hovered while it's pressed or toggled on.
The default style for the button.
The style applied when the button is pressed.
